name: pharos-safeguard
description: Three-mode onchain safety skill for Pharos Agent Center.

scripts.demo:skill:safe: tsx src/skill-cli.ts --mode sentinel --prompt "Can my agent send 5 USDC?" --wallet 0x7395E49d02fD4Fdb321CA69761F97bA698E44484 --usd 5
scripts.demo:skill:unsafe: tsx src/skill-cli.ts --mode sentinel --prompt "Can my agent approve unlimited USDC for 0x0000000000000000000000000000000000000001?" --wallet 0x7395E49d02fD4Fdb321CA69761F97bA698E44484 --usd 100
